title: General Consultation
shortDescription: Comprehensive health checkups and personalized medical advice for your overall well-being.
fullDescription: Our general consultation provides a thorough evaluation of your current health status. We focus on preventive care, early detection of potential issues, and lifestyle modifications to optimize your health.

title: Full Body Checkup
shortDescription: Comprehensive screening including blood tests, BP monitoring, and general diagnostics.
fullDescription: A complete health assessment covering vital parameters, blood work, and physical examination to catch any issues early and keep you in optimal health.

title: Preventative Care
shortDescription: Proactive screening and vaccinations to keep you healthy before symptoms appear.
fullDescription: We believe in stopping illnesses before they start. Our preventative care includes lifestyle counseling, vaccination schedules, and regular monitoring based on your age and health profile.

title: Virtual Consultation
shortDescription: Secure phone or video consultations from the comfort of your home.
fullDescription: Can't make it to the clinic? Our telemedicine service brings medical expertise to your home. Perfect for follow-ups, prescription refills, and minor urgent care needs.
